Stub implementations for I2C hardware abstraction layer functions.

# Purpose
This code is a C source file that provides a hardware abstraction layer (HAL) for I2C communication. It includes function declarations for initializing, enabling, disabling, and managing I2C bus transfers. The functions [`i2c_hal_init`](<#i2c_hal_init>), [`i2c_hal_enable`](<#i2c_hal_enable>), and [`i2c_hal_disable`](<#i2c_hal_disable>) are used to set up and control the I2C bus. The function [`i2c_hal_is_busy`](<#i2c_hal_is_busy>) checks the status of the I2C bus, returning a boolean value to indicate if the bus is busy. Additionally, [`i2c_hal_abort_transfer`](<#i2c_hal_abort_transfer>), [`i2c_hal_init_transfer`](<#i2c_hal_init_transfer>), and [`i2c_hal_start_transfer`](<#i2c_hal_start_transfer>) manage the lifecycle of data transfers on the I2C bus. The file includes headers `i2c_hal.h` and `i2c_definitions.h`, which likely contain necessary definitions and declarations for I2C operations.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `drivers/i2c_hal.h`
- `drivers/i2c_definitions.h`
